title: Vanguard
subTitle: Qin, an accountant living in the UK, is targeted by the leader of a terrorist organisation. His only hope for survival is Vanguard, an elite security company.

subTitle: A group of explorers set out to search for a magical tree in the jungle and soon find a mysterious creature is waiting to attack them.

title: Higher Power
subTitle: A mad scientist scours the DNA of everyone on Earth to find someone capable of saving the planet. Soon, he kidnaps Joe, a former alcoholic, and his experiments impart a strange power to Joe.

subTitle: An ambitious eunuch takes undue advantage of the Emperor's illness to seize control over the Ming dynasty. However, an unforeseen rebellion erupts after the king recovers from his illness.

title: Gringo
subTitle: Harold Soyinka, who works for a pharmaceutical company, visits Mexico to supervise his firm's manufacturing plant. He then decides to plot his own abduction to make quick money.

title: The Beast
subTitle: In an AI ruled future, Gabrielle signs up for a DNA purification that will rid her of unnecessary emotions. However, reliving her past lives as part of the process turns unnerving.

title: Poseidon Rex
subTitle: During the quest for a lost treasure, things take a dangerous turn as a group of deep-sea divers accidentally awaken an aquatic dinosaur.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

title: Lawless
subTitle: Three siblings operate an illegal moonshine business using their restaurant as a front. Things take a turn when the oldest brother, Forrest, refuses to pay a bribe to a corrupt lawman.

title: The Legend of Loulan
subTitle: When young archaeologist Wu Tian finds a mirror from the Loulan civilisation, he goes on a mission to protect the treasure of the civilisation and uncover the secrets of the mysterious Ghost Army.

title: The Iron Claw
subTitle: The Von Erich siblings battle adversity and their father's imposing legacy as they climb the ranks of the professional wrestling world.

title: Atomic Blonde
subTitle: Lorraine Broughton, who works as a spy for MI6, is sent on a mission to Berlin just before the collapse of the wall, to get hold of a stolen list, which has the names of exceptional secret agents.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: Backstabbing for Beginners
subTitle: Michael, a young United Nations employee, is shocked when he discovers a scandalous global conspiracy involving the murder of his predecessor.

title: Jackdaw
subTitle: A former athlete and veteran cares for his younger brother amid financial woes. He takes a perilous job, leading to a dangerous adventure through a barren landscape.

title: Runner Runner
subTitle: Richie, a Princeton graduate, loses his tuition in online poker and seeks out Ivan, a wealthy gambling tycoon, only to find himself entangled in a dangerous web of crime.

title: Cold Skin
subTitle: A meteorologist travels to a remote island in the South Atlantic to work as a weather observer. However, he finds himself trapped amongst dangerous creatures living on the island.

title: Tai Chi Hero
subTitle: Lu Chan is still trying to find his place in his new home, but his presence in Chen Village triggers a curse on the town.

title: Jurassic Hunt
subTitle: Parker joins a crew of trophy hunters tasked with shooting down genetically recreated dinosaurs. However, things take a turn when their guide gets killed by a raptor. Will the group survive?

title: Unfaithful
subTitle: When a suburban wife meets a Manhattan book dealer and begins an affair, her husband begins to suspect something and hires a detective. Soon learning the truth, the husband takes matters into his own hands and decides to confront his wife's lover.

title: Mona Lisa and the Blood Moon
subTitle: Mona Lisa, a woman with psychokinetic powers, escapes from a mental asylum and travels to New Orleans. Once there, she meets Bonnie who decides to make use of her powers to earn money.

title: Mayhem
subTitle: A virus spreads through a law firm, transforming all the employees into uninhibited, violent zombies. But a recently fired employee, Derek, decides to fight through the horde to get to his job back.
